data: {"generalSituation":"The easterly airstream now affecting the coast of Guangdong will be replaced by a southerly airstream gradually today and tomorrow. There will still be a few showers over the region. Under the influence of upper-air disturbances, the weather is expected to be unsettled over southern China midweek this week. With an anticyclone aloft strengthening gradually, the weather will improve and it will be persistently hot over the coast of southern China in the latter part of this week to early next week.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260518","week":"Monday","forecastWind":"East to southeast force 5, force 6 offshore and up to force 8 on high ground at first.","forecastWeather":"Cloudy with a few showers.","forecastMaxtemp":{"value":27,"unit":"C"},"forecastMintemp":{"value":24,"unit":"C"},"forecastMaxrh":{"value":95,"unit":"percent"},"forecastMinrh":{"value":75,"unit":"percent"},"ForecastIcon":62,"PSR":"Medium Low"},{"forecastDate":"20260519","week":"Tuesday","forecastWind":"Southeast force 3 to 4.","forecastWeather":"Mainly cloudy with a few showers.","forecastMaxtemp":{"value":29,"unit":"C"},"forecastMintemp":{"value":25,"unit":"C"},"forecastMaxrh":{"value":95,"unit":"percent"},"forecastMinrh":{"value":75,"unit":"percent"},"ForecastIcon":62,"PSR":"Medium"},{"forecastDate":"20260520","week":"Wednesday","forecastWind":"South to southeast force 3.","forecastWeather":"Mainly cloudy with a few showers and isolated thunderstorms.
